name: Basic Prompt Chaining
instruction:
Create a Langflow flow called 'Basic Prompt Chaining'.
Description: Connect multiple prompts in sequence where each output becomes the next stage's input, enabling step-by-step text processing.
Tags: chatbots

The flow should use approximately 8 components and 7 connections.
Components to use: Prompt, ChatInput, Chat Output, Prompt, Prompt, LanguageModelComponent, LanguageModelComponent, LanguageModelComponent
canonical_text:
# Basic Prompt Chaining
# Connect multiple prompts in sequence where each output becomes the next stage's input, enabling step-by-step text processing.

nodes:
  A: Prompt
  B: ChatInput
  C: ChatOutput
  D: Prompt
  E: Prompt
  F: LanguageModelComponent
  G: LanguageModelComponent
  H: LanguageModelComponent

edges:
  B -> F [message]
  E -> F [system]
  F -> G [message]
  A -> G [system]
  G -> H [message]
  D -> H [system]
  H -> C [message]

canonical.name: Basic Prompt Chaining
canonical.description: Connect multiple prompts in sequence where each output becomes the next stage's input, enabling step-by-step text processing.

edges:

canonical.name: Basic Prompting

  J: TavilySearchComponent
  K: ChatOutput

  H -> A [tool]

name: RAG article in web with Agent
instruction:
Create a Langflow flow called 'RAG article in web with Agent'.
Description: It needs Split Text Tool to agent be able to create chunks from the URL content

The flow should use approximately 7 components and 5 connections.
Components to use: URLComponent, AstraDB, Agent, Prompt, ChatOutput, SplitText, ChatInput
canonical_text:
# RAG article in web with Agent
# It needs Split Text Tool to agent be able to create chunks from the URL content

nodes:
  A: URLComponent
  B: AstraDB
  C: Agent
  D: Prompt
  E: ChatOutput
  F: SplitText
  G: ChatInput

edges:
  C -> E [message]
  B -> C [tool]
  A -> C [tool]
  D -> C [system]
  G -> C [message]

canonical.name: RAG article in web with Agent
canonical.description: It needs Split Text Tool to agent be able to create chunks from the URL content
